heroVariantB.title: Engineered Technical Textiles for Coating, Lamination & Performance
heroVariantB.subtitle: Consistent substrates. Predictable performance.
heroVariantB.description: With zero-discharge manufacturing, waterless finishing, and a commitment to clean, responsible production, we combine engineering precision with sustainable innovation. We don't just supply fabrics — we build long-term partnerships based on trust, transparency, and technical excellence.

process.title: A development workflow built around technical clarity and manufacturing follow-through
process.description: Each project starts with application needs and ends with a tested, reliable solution — whether the requirement is a knitted base fabric, a coated surface, or a new laminated construction.

steps.title: Understand the application
steps.description: We begin with end-use conditions, performance expectations, coating compatibility, and customization needs before recommending a fabric or material route.

steps.title: Develop the right substrate and finish
steps.description: Our teams match knit structure, surface treatment, lamination, or PU systems to the requirement, building practical samples for evaluation.

steps.title: Validate, scale, and support
steps.description: In-house testing, disciplined production control, and responsive commercial support help move successful developments toward repeatable supply.

spotlight.title: Full in-house production, coating expertise, and sustainability discipline
spotlight.description: Nirbhay's strength comes from connecting fabric expertise with coating knowledge, process control, responsive delivery, and customization — built on trust, transparency, and technical excellence.

banner.title: NK
banner.subtitle: From regional textile specialist to integrated materials and coatings partner

journeySection.title: How Nirbhay Is Evolving
journeySection.storyTitle: Engineering precision with sustainable innovation for over 40 years
paragraphs: For over 40 years, Nirbhay Knitting has engineered technical textiles that serve as the foundation for high-performance coated and laminated materials. From 3D spacer fabrics to coated-ready knits and raised substrates, our materials are designed to perform consistently on coating and lamination lines.

With zero-discharge manufacturing, waterless finishing, and a commitment to clean, responsible production, we combine engineering precision with sustainable innovation. We don't just supply fabrics — we build long-term partnerships based on trust, transparency, and technical excellence.

milestones.title: Knitted fabrics and coated textile support
milestones.description: Core manufacturing centered on knitted fabrics, vinyl coating support, and industrial application know-how.

milestones.title: In-house testing capability
milestones.description: Quality control and customer-specific validation became central to the company's operating model.

milestones.title: Interplast Kimya represented
milestones.description: PU resins and lacquers strengthened vertical integration and cross-selling potential.

milestones.title: New fabric categories launched
milestones.description: 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, and recycled-yarn developments broadened the offer.

milestones.title: Coating and innovation pipeline expands
milestones.description: Laminating, PU coating, coated 3D materials, FR trials, and breathable coatings define the current direction.

story.title: Built for industrial performance, positioned for international growth
paragraphs: Nirbhay combines 125 MT/month manufacturing capability, coating support, and testing discipline for applications where consistency and customization matter. Its portfolio spans knitted base fabrics, 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, recycled yarn fabrics, vinyl coated textiles, and value-added coating services — with FR fabrics and breathable coatings in active development.

The company is expanding through laminating, PU coating, Interplast Kimya-linked chemistry, and a focused innovation pipeline. With a sustainability profile aligned with European market expectations, Nirbhay is building long-term partnerships based on trust, transparency, and technical excellence.

banner.title: Nirbhay Chemicals
banner.subtitle: Coating, laminating, and chemical solutions for advanced material systems
banner.description: NirChem extends Nirbhay's offering through PU coating, laminating, vinyl coated textile support, specialty finishes, and the added strength of Interplast Kimya representation.

nc.divisionLogoAlt: NirChem - a division of Nirbhay Knitting Industries
nc.divisionStatement: A division focused on value-added coating, laminating, and chemistry-backed material development.

processStages.title: Substrate Preparation
processStages.description: The process begins with selecting and preparing the right knitted base fabric. Every substrate is inspected for weight, structure, and surface consistency before entering the coating line.

processStages.title: Coating Application
processStages.description: PU or vinyl coating is applied using direct coating techniques. Application parameters are controlled to meet customer specifications for each substrate and end-use.

processStages.title: Lamination
processStages.description: Multiple layers are bonded under controlled pressure and temperature. The laminating process creates composite materials with enhanced mechanical and surface performance.

processStages.title: Curing and Drying
processStages.description: Coated substrates pass through controlled drying and heat setting. Temperature and speed profiles are calibrated for each chemistry system and end-use requirement.

processStages.title: Quality and Finish
processStages.description: Final surface treatment, testing, and quality certification. Every batch is validated against customer specifications before dispatch.

products.name: Vinyl Coated Textiles
products.description: Durable coated textile systems developed for industrial applications where surface protection, consistency, and reliable substrate performance are essential.

products.name: PU Coating and Laminating
products.description: New laminating and PU coating capabilities open the door to higher-value coated constructions, contract manufacturing, and customer-specific surface solutions.

products.name: Contract Manufacturing / Job Work
products.description: NirChem can support partners as a processing specialist, combining textile understanding with coating know-how for outsourced development and production needs.

products.name: Interplast Resins and Lacquers
products.description: Through the Interplast Kimya relationship, customers gain access to PU resins and lacquers that complement Nirbhay's coating and textile development capabilities.

products.name: Breathable Coating Systems
products.description: Current innovation work includes water-based breathable coatings and coated 3D constructions designed to move the portfolio into more advanced technical territory.

capabilities.title: Product Range
capabilities.unit: Coated textiles, laminated composites, specialty finishes

innovation.title: Breathable Coating Systems in Development
innovation.description: Current innovation work includes water-based breathable coatings and coated 3D constructions designed to move the portfolio into more advanced technical territory. Combined with FR textile development, these next-generation systems aim to address growing performance and sustainability requirements.
innovation.detail: The R&D pipeline focuses on three frontiers: water-based breathable coatings for reduced environmental impact, coated 3D spacer constructions for automotive and technical applications, and FR (flame retardant) substrates for protective end-uses.

partnership.title: Backed by Interplast Kimya
partnership.description: Through the Interplast Kimya (Turkey) partnership, NirChem customers gain access to PU resins and lacquers that complement Nirbhay's coating and textile development capabilities — enabling vertical integration and higher-value coated solutions.
capabilities: PU resins for coating and laminating applications
Vertical integration into higher-value coated solutions

contentBlock.title: Where chemistry and textile know-how come together
contentBlock.description: NirChem connects coating capability, laminating, and chemical support to Nirbhay's textile base. The result is a more integrated platform for customers seeking performance-driven coated materials and future-ready developments.

banner.title: Sustainability
banner.subtitle: Responsible process choices built into manufacturing
banner.description: Nirbhay's sustainability direction is grounded in water-free finishing, certified zero discharge operations, efficient utilities, reduced chemical footprint, and lower-impact product development.

intro.title: How we approach responsible manufacturing
paragraphs: Nirbhay's sustainability profile comes from practical operating choices: all finishing processes are water free, the facility follows a zero discharge model, and energy usage is managed for efficiency. These decisions reduce process complexity while supporting cleaner production discipline.

The product roadmap also reflects this direction. Recycled yarn fabric options are already part of the portfolio, while new development work focuses on lower-footprint coating systems, coated 3D materials, and water-based breathable solutions for the future.

pillars.title: Zero Discharge Facility
pillars.description: Manufacturing is built around zero discharge operations, reducing environmental impact and aligning with international sustainability standards.

pillars.title: Water-Free Finishing
pillars.description: All finishing processes are water free, reducing water dependency and helping simplify environmental process management.

pillars.title: Efficient Utility Profile
pillars.description: The facility operates on clean energy inputs, supporting a controlled and efficient production environment.

pillars.title: Lower-Impact Product Development
pillars.description: Recycled yarn fabrics, future water-based coatings, and cleaner finishing choices are part of a broader move toward more responsible material innovation.

pillars.title: Reduced Chemical Footprint
pillars.description: Through the Interplast Kimya partnership and focused R&D in water-based breathable coatings, Nirbhay is actively reducing chemical intensity across its coating and finishing operations.

team.sectionSubtitle: The teams supporting leadership, development, operations, and customer needs

leadership.name: Technical and Commercial Team
